html:
Tentacle Spots are a rare item with a 20% drop chance from a killed Tentacle and a 40% chance from a killed Big Tentacle. They can be used to craft the Feather Hat, and Wickerbottom can use them to craft the Book, "On Tentacles". Tentacle Spots do not spoil and can also be burned as fuel in a Campfire or Fire Pit.

Contents

  • 1 Downloadable Content
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Downloadable Content

The Reign of Giants DLC adds another use for Tentacle Spots as one of the ingredients for a Rain Coat. Befriended Catcoons can also produce Tentacle Spots.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Tentacle Spots can be obtained by killing the tentacles spawned by the Quacken.

Trivia

  • Multiple characters suggest that Tentacle Spots are the genitalia of the Tentacles, supported by Maxwell's quote, "This is how they reproduce", Wickerbottom's quote "Hmmm, reproductive organs", and Wilson's quote, "I think it was its genitalia.". Other character quotes suggest this, but not as notable.

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đốm Xúc Tu là một vật phẩm hiếm với 20% cơ hội rơi ra từ Xúc Tua bị giết và 40% cơ hội rơi ra từ Xúc Tua Lớn bị giết. Chúng có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Mũ Lông Vũ và Wickerbottom có ​​thể sử dụng chúng để chế tạo Sách "On Tentacles". Đốm Xúc Tua không bị hỏng và cũng có thể được đốt làm nhiên liệu trong Lửa Trại hoặc Lò Lửa.

'''Tentacle Spots''' are a rare [[item]] with a 20% drop chance from a killed [[Tentacle]] and a 40% chance from a killed [[Big Tentacle]]. They can be used to craft the [[Feather Hat]], and [[Wickerbottom]] can use them to craft the [[Books|Book]], "On Tentacles". Tentacle Spots do not spoil and can also be burned as fuel in a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]].

=={{pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
The ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC adds another use for Tentacle Spots as one of the ingredients for a [[Rain Coat]]. Befriended [[Catcoon]]s can also produce Tentacle Spots.

In the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Tentacle Spots can be obtained by killing the tentacles spawned by the [[Quacken]].

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Multiple characters suggest that Tentacle Spots are the genitalia of the Tentacles, supported by [[Maxwell (character)|Maxwell's]] quote, "This is how they reproduce", Wickerbottom's quote "Hmmm, reproductive organs", and Wilson's quote, "I think it was its genitalia.". Other character quotes suggest this, but not as notable.
